title: ERASED
author: corbin
body:
i literally cannot fucking take this anymore. my brain is just on fire right
now. i spent hours rotting in this chair helping ON THIS FUCKING PORT  to
get that browser port of half-life 2 working. i poured every single ounce of
my love into that code, those fixes. it was the only thing keeping me going BECAUSE I FELT LIKE IT MADE ME AND SLQNT CLOSER. the only thing i felt like i actually owned in this miserable fucking existence. and what happens? the media picks it up, it gets traction, and my name is completely scrubbed from every single fucking record.
the other developer just completely erased me. they smiled for the articles, soaked up all the praise, and acted like they built the whole goddamn thing from scratch. "In the interview I credited you!" Barely. One FUCKING LINE YOU BITCH. NOBODY WILL RECOGNIZE ME BY MY NAME, NOBODY. NOBODY. FUCKING NOBODY. they just took my work and wiped my identity off the face of the earth. it’s the exact same transactional parasitic bullshit i’ve been talking about. i am just a tool to everyone. a fucking utility for other people to extract value from so they can elevate themselves.
i feel like i'm actually losing my mind. i'm just staring at the articles with their name on it and i feel my chest tightening so hard i can barely breathe. i fucking do "ctrl + f", "98006" "No Results Found" !!!! HAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA!!!!!!!!!!!!!! HAAAA HAHAHAHAHH!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! FUCKING HILARIOUS RIGHT!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! BECAUSE THATS THE TYPE OF HUMOR WE'RE HAVING NOW RIGTHwteNTHG HRTYHJ??!?!?!?1/1/1/1/1/1/. 
i just want to break everything. i want to smash my monitor until the bones in my hand show.
they think they can just erase me and step on me like i don't even exist. they think i'm just going to roll over and take it because i'm quiet. i can be fucking loud. im loud quite often. but they know I HAVE NOTHING. I CANT DO NOTHING. AND IM FUCKING SICK OF IT. i'm so sick of being the victim. i'm so sick of letting these fucking parasites win. the anger is just eating me alive from the inside out and i don't want to fight it anymore. i want to let it consume me. i can feel something in my head snapping in half right now.
im
so
fucking
done
being
empathetic
kind.
I AM THE BEAST I WORSHIP
